message:
fix(daemon): propagate poll_interval, prediction disable, and notification config on SIGHUP reload

Three config-reload gaps found by deep audit: PID controller poll_interval_ms
was stale after reload, disabling prediction left stale urgency thresholds
active, and NotificationManager config (webhook URLs, channels, cooldowns)
was never updated. Also includes cross-agent clippy and test fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
